rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the cards keep circling back to purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. Past opens with Stork (17), putting a healthy update ready to happen in focus and setting the emotional weather around the reading. Here, Stork emphasizes improvement, transition, upgrades, and the feeling that something is trying to move into a better form.
